jsonLd.title: Hiring Category Manager at Ajio
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Ajio. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Category Manager to strengthen our Kochi-based team.

About Ajio:
Ajio is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Supply Chain

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Ajio!
